name: careology-todo-app
description: The goal of this project is to implement the required todo app features and the optional bonus requirements with a clean, modular, and maintainable architecture.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @careology/api --workspace @careology/web --if-present --ignore-scripts
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @careology/shared && npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @careology/api --workspace @careology/web --if-present --ignore-scripts
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspace @careology/api --workspace @careology/web --if-present --ignore-scripts
scripts.test:db: npm run build:shared && npm run test:db --workspace @careology/api --ignore-scripts
